title: Uji: Being-Time
description: Dogen's radical teaching that time and existence are one and the same — each moment is all of being.
introduction: Dogen's radical teaching that time and existence are one and the same — each moment is all of being.

translation.original_text: いはゆる有時は、時すでにこれ有なり、有はみな時なり。
translation.text: So-called being-time means: time is already being, and all being is time.
